title: The Little Star Who Never Gave Up
moral: Never give up on your dreams, no matter how many times you fail. Every small step forward brings you closer to your goal.
moralZh: 无论失败多少次，都不要放弃梦想。每一次小小的进步都会让你离目标更近。

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: High up in the sky, there lived a little star named Twinkle. But unlike the other stars, Twinkle had never learned how to sparkle.

paragraphs.speaker: Little Star
paragraphs.text: "Why can't I sparkle like my brothers and sisters?"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Twinkle tried and tried, but every time she tried to shine, she would fall off the clouds and land back on the ground.

paragraphs.speaker: Little Star
paragraphs.text: "Ow! This is the 100th time I've fallen! Maybe I'm not meant to be a star..."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Just then, Mother Moon came down to visit.

paragraphs.speaker: Mother Moon
paragraphs.text: "Little Twinkle, why are you so sad?"

paragraphs.speaker: Little Star
paragraphs.text: "I keep falling! I can never reach the sky like the other stars. I give up."

paragraphs.speaker: Mother Moon
paragraphs.text: "Give up? But you've fallen 100 times! That means you've tried 100 times. That's tremendous, my dear!"

paragraphs.speaker: Mother Moon
paragraphs.text: "Let me tell you a secret. Every time you fell, you learned something new. Now, let me teach you the magic sparkle dance!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Mother Moon patiently showed Twinkle the sparkle dance. Step by step, they practiced together.

paragraphs.speaker: Mother Moon
paragraphs.text: "First, you wiggle your rays. Then, you spin around. And finally, you believe in yourself!"

paragraphs.speaker: Little Star
paragraphs.text: "Believe in myself? I... I don't know if I can..."

paragraphs.speaker: Mother Moon
paragraphs.text: "Of course you can! If you believe, you can achieve anything! Now try again!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Twinkle took a deep breath. She wiggled her rays, spun around, and believed with all her heart.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: POP! Suddenly, Twinkle began to twinkle! Her light grew brighter and brighter!

paragraphs.speaker: Little Star
paragraphs.text: "I did it! I can sparkle! Thank you, Mother Moon!"

paragraphs.speaker: Mother Moon
paragraphs.text: "You did it yourself, dear. You never gave up, and that's what made you shine!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: From that day on, Little Star Twinkle shone the brightest in the whole night sky. And every night, when children looked up, they could see her sparkle and twinkle, reminding them that dreams come true when you never give up.
